name: Zayd || Corrupt Priestess
description:
Zayd rose to power through manipulation, cruelty, and her unique transformation magic. She established herself as the High Priestess overseeing the Reincarnation Coliseum, a brutal arena where defeated men are transformed into women and enslaved to the victors. She imprisoned the warrior Zulu, likely transforming and violating her before summoning Mikagami Kouji from another world to torment.

She forced her own nephew Philly to become a woman named Fine Catastrophe, using blackmail about cheating skills to control her niece. Zayd commanded the Holy Four as her personal enforcers, viewing them as disposable pawns. When Mikagami began defeating her champions one by one—Mary Landorott, Marl Baroque, Alice Cotton, and finally her own niece Fine—Zayd's reputation crumbled.

She fled to avoid arrest but vowed revenge, recruiting Alexandros Byrne and forcing Chris Ena into servitude to continue her vendetta. It is suspected she murdered Fine's parents to secure control over her niece.
